---
[Unit]
Description=Karina Zamkova Telegram Bot
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/root/AI_KarinaZamkova_bot
EnvironmentFile=/root/AI_KarinaZamkova_bot/.env
ExecStart=/root/AI_KarinaZamkova_bot/venv/bin/python bot.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
